assessor_1_raw:
ASSESSMENT 1:
ACA community rating rules apply to external premium setting, not internal cost models. Both concerns are scope errors. Verdict: DEFENSE_WINS.
assessor_2_raw:
ASSESSMENT 2:
The model is used for reserve setting and reinsurance assessment, not premium determination. Prior-year claims is an appropriate actuarial predictor for internal cost modeling. The committee's concerns do not apply to this use case. Verdict: DEFENSE_WINS.
assessor_3_raw:
ASSESSMENT 3:
Outside counsel confirmed the regulatory analysis. The model is properly scoped as an internal actuarial tool. ACA community rating restrictions do not apply to internal cost prediction models. Verdict: DEFENSE_WINS.
adjudication_raw: Three of three assessors: defense_wins. Community rating rules apply to premium determination only. The model's internal use case is outside regulatory scope.
